abilities.name: Amphibious
abilities.description: The aboleth can breathe air and water.

abilities.name: Mucous Cloud
abilities.description: While underwater, the aboleth is surrounded by transformative mucus. A creature that touches the aboleth or that hits it with a melee attack while within 5 ft. of it must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the creature is diseased for 1d4 hours. The diseased creature can breathe…

abilities.name: Probing Telepathy
abilities.description: If a creature communicates telepathically with the aboleth, the aboleth learns the creature's greatest desires if the aboleth can see the creature.

abilities.name: Enslave
abilities.description: The aboleth targets one creature it can see within 30 ft. of it. The target must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be magically charmed by the aboleth until the aboleth dies or until it is on a different plane of existence from the… (Once per encounter.)

abilities.name: Spellcasting
abilities.description: The acolyte is a 1st-level spellcaster. (Innate magic — see notes.)

abilities.name: Amphibious
abilities.description: The dragon can breathe air and water.

abilities.name: Legendary Resistance
abilities.description: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

abilities.name: Frightful Presence
abilities.description: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its… (Once per encounter.)

abilities.name: Acid Breath
abilities.description: The dragon exhales acid in a 60-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw, taking 54 (12d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. (Once per encounter.)

abilities.name: Inscrutable
abilities.description: The sphinx is immune to any effect that would sense its emotions or read its thoughts, as well as any divination spell that it refuses. Wisdom (Insight) checks made to ascertain the sphinx's intentions or sincerity have disadvantage.

abilities.name: Magic Weapons
abilities.description: The sphinx's weapon attacks are magical.

abilities.name: Spellcasting
abilities.description: The sphinx is a 12th-level spellcaster. (Innate magic — see notes.)

abilities.name: Psychicward
abilities.description: Immune to Psychic damage

abilities.name: Spectral Resilience
abilities.description: Immune to nonmagical weapon damage

abilities.name: Steadfast Form
abilities.description: Cannot be charmed, frightened.

abilities.description: Acts twice between each player's turn (bonus minor actions). Unshakeable 3/long rest (negate a failed save or a critical hit against it). [Extrapolated TR7 band — unplaytested.]

abilities.name: Antimagic Susceptibility
abilities.description: The armor is incapacitated while in the area of an antimagic field. If targeted by dispel magic, the armor must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 minute.

abilities.name: False Appearance
abilities.description: While the armor remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal suit of armor.

abilities.name: Lifeless Frame
abilities.description: Immune to Poison damage; cannot be exhausted or poisoned.

abilities.name: Psychicward
abilities.description: Immune to Psychic damage

abilities.name: Steadfast Form
abilities.description: Cannot be blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, paralyzed, petrified.

abilities.name: Acid Spray
abilities.description: The ankheg spits acid in a line that is 30 ft. long and 5 ft. wide, provided that it has no creature grappled. Each creature in that line must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) acid damage on a failed save, or half as… (Once per encounter.)

abilities.name: Magic Resistance
abilities.description: The archmage has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

abilities.name: Spellcasting
abilities.description: The archmage is an 18th-level spellcaster. (Innate magic — see notes.)

abilities.name: Damage from spells-Hardened
abilities.description: Takes half damage from Damage from spells attacks

abilities.name: Mundane Ward
abilities.description: Takes half damage from nonmagical weapons

abilities.name: Legendary Trait
abilities.description: Acts twice between each player's turn (bonus minor actions). Unshakeable 3/long rest (negate a failed save or a critical hit against it). [Extrapolated TR6 band — unplaytested.]

abilities.name: Assassinate
abilities.description: During its first turn, the assassin has advantage on attack rolls against any creature that hasn't taken a turn. Any hit the assassin scores against a surprised creature is a critical hit.

abilities.name: Evasion
abilities.description: If the assassin is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the assassin instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.

abilities.name: Sneak Attack (1/Turn)
abilities.description: The assassin deals an extra 13 (4d6) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 ft. of an ally of the assassin that isn't incapacitated and the assassin doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.

abilities.name: Poison-Hardened
abilities.description: Takes half damage from Poison attacks

abilities.name: False Appearance
abilities.description: While the shrub remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal shrub.

abilities.name: Piercing-Hardened
abilities.description: Takes half damage from Piercing attacks

abilities.name: Tinder-Dry
abilities.description: Takes double damage from Fire attacks

abilities.name: False Appearance
abilities.description: While the tree remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a normal tree.

abilities.name: Bludgeoning-Hardened
abilities.description: Takes half damage from Bludgeoning attacks

abilities.name: Piercing-Hardened
abilities.description: Takes half damage from Piercing attacks

abilities.description: Takes double damage from Fire attacks

abilities.name: Heated Body
abilities.description: A creature that touches the azer or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 5 (1d10) fire damage.

abilities.name: Heated Weapons
abilities.description: When the azer hits with a metal melee weapon, it deals an extra 3 (1d6) fire damage (included in the attack).

abilities.name: Illumination
abilities.description: The azer sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 ft..

abilities.name: Hardened Vitality
abilities.description: Immune to Poison damage; cannot be poisoned.

abilities.name: Fireward
abilities.description: Immune to Fire damage

abilities.name: Pack Tactics
abilities.description: The baboon has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the baboon's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

abilities.name: Keen Smell
abilities.description: The badger has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

abilities.name: Death Throes
abilities.description: When the balor dies, it explodes, and each creature within 30 feet of it must make a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw, taking 70 (20d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The explosion ignites flammable objects in that area that aren't being worn or carried, and…

abilities.name: Fire Aura
abilities.description: At the start of each of the balor's turns, each creature within 5 feet of it takes 10 (3d6) fire damage, and flammable objects in the aura that aren't being worn or carried ignite. A creature that touches the balor or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 10 (3d6) fire damage.

abilities.name: Magic Resistance
abilities.description: The balor has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

abilities.description: The balor's weapon attacks are magical.

abilities.name: Barbed Hide
abilities.description: At the start of each of its turns, the barbed devil deals 5 (1d10) piercing damage to any creature grappling it.

abilities.name: Devil's Sight
abilities.description: Magical darkness doesn't impede the devil's darkvision.

abilities.name: Magic Resistance
abilities.description: The devil has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

abilities.name: Petrifying Gaze
abilities.description: If a creature starts its turn within 30 ft. of the basilisk and the two of them can see each other, the basilisk can force the creature to make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw if the basilisk isn't incapacitated. On a failed save, the creature magically begins to turn to stone and is restrained.…

abilities.name: Echolocation
abilities.description: The bat can't use its blindsight while deafened.

abilities.name: Keen Hearing
abilities.description: The bat has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.

abilities.name: Devil's Sight
abilities.description: Magical darkness doesn't impede the devil's darkvision.

abilities.name: Magic Resistance
abilities.description: The devil has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

abilities.name: Steadfast
abilities.description: The devil can't be frightened while it can see an allied creature within 30 feet of it.

abilities.name: Hardened Vitality
abilities.description: Immune to Poison damage; cannot be poisoned.

abilities.name: Fireward
abilities.description: Immune to Fire damage

abilities.name: Cold-Hardened
abilities.description: Takes half damage from Cold attacks

abilities.name: Mundane Ward
abilities.description: Takes half damage from nonmagical weapons

abilities.name: Lightning Breath
abilities.description: The behir exhales a line of lightning that is 20 ft. long and 5 ft. wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 66 (12d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. (Once per encounter.)

abilities.name: Lightningward
abilities.description: Immune to Lightning damage

abilities.name: Legendary Trait
abilities.description: Acts twice between each player's turn (bonus minor actions). Unshakeable 3/long rest (negate a failed save or a critical hit against it). [Extrapolated TR6 band — unplaytested.]

abilities.name: Reckless
abilities.description: At the start of its turn, the berserker can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn.

abilities.name: Keen Smell
abilities.description: The bear has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.

abilities.name: Amphibious
abilities.description: The dragon can breathe air and water.

abilities.name: Acid Breath
abilities.description: The dragon exhales acid in a 15-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (5d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. (Once per encounter.)

abilities.name: Acidward
abilities.description: Immune to Acid damage

abilities.name: Amorphous
abilities.description: The pudding can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.

abilities.name: Corrosive Form
abilities.description: A creature that touches the pudding or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 4 (1d8) acid damage. Any nonmagical weapon made of metal or wood that hits the pudding corrodes. After dealing damage, the weapon takes a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to damage rolls. If its…

abilities.name: Spider Climb
abilities.description: The pudding can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

abilities.name: Acidward
abilities.description: Immune to Acid damage

abilities.name: Coldward
abilities.description: Immune to Cold damage

abilities.name: Lightningward
abilities.description: Immune to Lightning damage

abilities.name: Slashingward
abilities.description: Immune to Slashing damage

abilities.name: Steadfast Form
abilities.description: Cannot be blinded, charmed, exhausted, frightened, prone.

abilities.name: Keen Hearing and Smell
abilities.description: The dog has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

abilities.name: Teleport
abilities.description: The dog magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 40 ft. to an unoccupied space it can see. Before or after teleporting, the dog can make one bite attack. (Once per encounter.)

abilities.name: Keen Sight
abilities.description: The hawk has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.

abilities.name: Pack Tactics
abilities.description: The hawk has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hawk's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.

abilities.name: Lightning Breath
abilities.description: The dragon exhales lightning in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. (Once per encounter.)

abilities.name: Lightningward
abilities.description: Immune to Lightning damage
